Package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog

Class CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog

java.lang.Object
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog.HistoryLog
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog.CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog
public class CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog extends HistoryLog
CGM Rise Rate Alert (RRA) settings change history log entry. Fields parsed from the decompiled CgmGlucoseAlertSettingsModel: alertLevel (raw[10-11]): uint16 - the rise rate threshold value (mg/dL/min) repeatDuration (raw[12-13]): uint16 - repeat alert duration in minutes isEnabled (raw[14]): boolean - whether the alert is enabled modifiedField (raw[16-17]): uint16 - which field was changed: 0=ENABLE, 1=THRESHOLD, 2=DURATION, 3=INVALID
